title: Nuevo presidente de Honduras evalúa los lazos con China
title_cn: 洪都拉斯新总统评价对华关系
summary: Nasry Asfura, el presidente recién investido de Honduras, está revisando los acuerdos firmados con China por su predecesora, Xiomara Castro, antes de tomar una decisión sobre el restablecimiento de las relaciones con Taiwán. Asfura conversó con Erik Schatzker de Bloomberg el 6 de mayo, en el marco de la Conferencia Global del Milken Institute en Beverly Hills.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: BASF Coatings’ €3.9 Billion Debt Deal Lures Threefold Demand
title_cn: 巴斯夫涂料 39 亿欧元债务交易吸引三倍需求
summary: A debt package for the auto paint and finishing division of European chemicals firm BASF SE drew demand of over three times the deal’s size, as investor interest in the troubled sector starts to revive after months in the doldrums.

title: Gundlach Warns About the Risks Facing Private Credit
title_cn: 冈拉克警告私人信贷面临的风险
summary: Jeffrey Gundlach, CEO and CIO of DoubleLine, discusses the current state of the private credit market. Gundlach compares the present moment in private credit to the conditions seen in 2007, highlighting significant risks and potential domino effects. He speaks on "Bloomberg The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: $10 Billion Golub Fund Caps Outflows After Requests for 8.5%
title_cn: 100 亿美元的 Golub 基金在要求 8.5% 后限制资金流出
summary: Golub Capital is capping withdrawals from its private credit fund after investors sought to pull 8.5% of shares, the latest instance of a money manager restricting outflows amid a wave of redemption requests.

 (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Google Judge Says Too Early to Pause DOJ Remedy in Search Case

title: Live from DoubleLine Capital | The Close 5/7/2026

(Source: Bloomberg)

summary: SoftBank Group Corp.’s stock rally faces a test against reality next week, with investors clamoring for assurance that the company’s multibillion-dollar bet on an increasingly embattled OpenAI will be worth the money.

summary: Expedia Group Inc. posted quarterly revenue that came in slightly ahead of estimates as it overcame Middle East-related travel disruptions and said it expected healthy demand from this summer’s FIFA World Cup.

title_cn: Cloudflare 预测未达预期，宣布裁员
summary: Cloudflare Inc. stock fell on Thursday after the company said it would slash jobs and gave a forecast for revenue that fell short of analysts’ expectations.

title_cn: 人工智能驱动的裁员后，多西的区块提高了预测

title: Airbnb Boosts Annual Sales Outlook While Spending Picks Up
title_cn: Airbnb 在支出增加的同时提高了年度销售前景
summary: Airbnb Inc. boosted its annual forecast on robust bookings in the major markets in the Americas, while it posted a big jump in spending as part of an effort to diversify the business.

title: Arm Warns of Phone Market Weakness | Bloomberg Tech 5/7/2026
title_cn: Arm 警告手机市场疲软彭博科技 2026 年 5 月 7 日

Plus, Anthropic signs an agreement with Elon Musk's SpaceX to access computing resources from its competitor. And, the CEO of HawkEye 360 discusses the satellite surveillance firm's IPO, which raised $416 million.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: GameStop's eBay Bid Is So Befuddling Even Merger Arbs Are Steering Clear
title_cn: GameStop 的 eBay 出价如此令人困惑，甚至连并购套利者都避开了

title_cn: HawkEye 360​​ 上市，IPO 需求最新迹象
summary: Hawkeye 360, a provider of satellite-based signals intelligence for US government agencies, raised $416 million in its US market debut. It’s the latest sign that the IPO market is picking up steam. HawkEye 360 CEO John Serafini speaks with Caroline Hyde on "Bloomberg Tech.” (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Tech Sector Layoffs Keep Mounting As Cuts in Other Sectors Fall
title_cn: 随着其他行业裁员的减少，科技行业裁员持续增加
summary: Tech sector job cuts and layoff announcements continue to mount in the US, even as overall private-sector layoff plans recede. Bloomberg’s Julia Fanzeres discusses what is driving the move in tech and how that’s translating to the wider economy. She joins Caroline Hyde on "Bloomberg Tech.”  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Day 3 From the Milken Institute Global Conference | The Close 5/6/2026

summary:

title: Apple’s Camera-Equipped AirPods Reach Late Testing in AI Device Push

summary: Apple Inc. has reached the late stages of development for new AirPods with built-in cameras, a significant milestone for what will likely be its first wearable device designed for the artificial intelligence era.

title: Everyone Wants a Piece of Ina Garten’s Forthcoming Podcast
title_cn: 每个人都想听听伊娜·加滕即将推出的播客
summary: Deal offers are reaching seven figures a year for a program that has yet to launch.

title: CoreWeave’s Stunning Rally Creates Prove-It Moment for Earnings
title_cn: CoreWeave 的惊人反弹为盈利创造了证明时刻
summary: CoreWeave Inc. shares are on a scorching run in 2026 as demand for computing capacity to power artificial intelligence keeps growing. But now investors want to see some proof that the neo-cloud provider is executing on its ambitious plans.

title: Apollo’s Marc Rowan Warns of Fallout From ‘Massive Geopolitical’ Shift
title_cn: 阿波罗计划的马克·罗文警告“大规模地缘政治”转变的影响
summary: Apollo Global Management Inc. Chief Executive Officer Marc Rowan said the world isn’t prepared for the shakeout from artificial intelligence, price pressures and rising government debt.

title: BlackRock Private Credit Fund Cuts Asset Value on Markdowns
title_cn: 贝莱德私人信贷基金降价削减资产价值
summary: BlackRock Inc. cut the value of its publicly-traded private credit fund by about 5%, as it struggled under the weight of troubled loans, markdowns and lower returns.

title: Arm CEO Sees AI Demand While Smartphone Business Slumps
title_cn: Arm 首席执行官在智能手机业务下滑的同时看到了人工智能需求
summary: Rene Haas, chief executive officer of Arm Holdings Plc, says demand for AI-related products is buoying the company amid a slowdown in its smartphone business. He speaks with Caroline Hyde on “Bloomberg Tech.” (Source: Bloomberg)

title: MNTN CEO: TV Remains Dominant Medium as Streaming Grows
title_cn: MNTN 首席执行官：随着流媒体的发展，电视仍然是主导媒体
summary: MNTN CEO Mark Douglas joins Bloomberg Open Interest to push back on the idea that TV is dying, arguing it remains the most powerful entertainment medium on earth. He explains how streaming is opening TV advertising to new businesses, why AI video tools are lowering production costs, and why the World Cup could be a massive moment for advertisers. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Trump-Xi Summit Stays on Track Despite China’s Iran Concerns
title_cn: 尽管中国担心伊朗问题，特习会仍保持正轨
summary: President Donald Trump is forging ahead with plans to hold a summit with counterpart Xi Jinping next week in Beijing, despite unease among Chinese officials about holding the high-stakes meeting before the war in Iran is resolved.

title: Trump’s Latest 10% Tariffs Found Unlawful by US Trade Court
title_cn: 美国贸易法庭认定特朗普最新 10% 关税非法
summary: President Donald Trump’s 10% global tariffs were declared unlawful by a federal trade court in a fresh blow to the administration’s economic agenda, just months after the US Supreme Court vacated earlier levies he’d imposed.

title: US Fires at Iranian Targets as Trump Demands Tehran Accept Deal
title_cn: 特朗普要求德黑兰接受协议，美国向伊朗目标开火
summary: The US struck military targets in Iran after the country fired on three Navy destroyers sailing in the Strait of Hormuz, an escalation that threatened to break apart a fragile ceasefire and reignite hostilities even as the two sides say they’re discussing an end to the war.

title: People Are Angry: Morelle on Tennessee Redistricting
title_cn: 人们很愤怒：莫雷尔谈田纳西州重新划分选区
summary: Representative Joe Morelle (D-NY) voices his frustrations with Tennessee adopting a new map that eliminates the state’s only Democratic congressional seat. He discusses being tasked with redistricting New York state in lieu of recent events and explains how these two processes have stark differences. Rep. Morelle also talks about his support to end lawmakers from participating in prediction markets and his reaction to NY Governor Kathy Hochul announcing a $268B state budget. He speaks with Kailey Leinz on the late edition of Bloomberg’s “Balance of Power.” (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Lula Emerges From Trump Meeting ‘Optimistic’ on Trade Resolution
title_cn: 卢拉在特朗普会议上对贸易解决方案持“乐观”态度
summary: President Luiz Inacio Lula da Silva said he was confident the US and Brazil would resolve trade and tariff issues in the coming weeks after what he described as a productive meeting with Donald Trump at the White House.

title: Starmer Awaits Fate as Polls Close in Crucial UK Elections
title_cn: 英国关键选举投票结束后斯塔默等待命运
summary: Keir Starmer is awaiting the results of one of the most consequential rounds of local elections in recent British history, a vote that could determine his future as prime minister and shape national policy in Europe’s second-largest economy.

title: UK Minister Urged Starmer to Plan Departure Timeline, Times Reports
title_cn: 据《泰晤士报》报道，英国大臣敦促斯塔默计划出发时间表
summary: UK Energy Secretary Ed Miliband privately urged Prime Minister Keir Starmer to consider setting out a timeline for his resignation, amid concerns that losses in the local election will see him forced out of office, The Times newspaper reported.

title: World’s Most Important Bromance Revived as Trump Heads to China
title_cn: 特朗普访华之际，世界最重要的兄弟情谊重燃
summary: When Donald Trump’s plane touches down in Beijing, he’ll become the first sitting US president to visit China in nearly a decade. His two-day summit with Xi Jinping extends a personal relationship that’s weathered a tariff war, pandemic and historic energy crisis.

title: Trump Gives EU Until July 4 to Ink Deal, Extending Deadline
title_cn: 特朗普允许欧盟在 7 月 4 日之前签署墨水协议，延长最后期限
summary: President Donald Trump said he would give the European Union until July 4 to ratify its trade agreement with the US, after previously threatening to hike tariffs on auto imports as soon as this week if it failed to do so.

title: US Awaits Iran Response on Deal, Stocks Decline From Highs | Bloomberg Businessweek Daily 5/07/2026
title_cn: 美国等待伊朗对协议的回应，股市从高位下跌|彭博商业周刊日报 5/07/2026
summary: On today's episode, Carol Massar and Tim Stenovec speaks Mike McKee, Bloomberg TV and Radio International Economics & Policy Correspondent on his interview with Mary Daly. They also spoke to Jeff Simmons, President and CEO at Elanco Animal Health, Rebecca Homkes, Lecturer at the London Business School and Dr. Pattie Maes, Head of Fluid Interfaces Group at MIT Media Lab. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: For Trump and Xi, Low Expectations for Beijing Summit Next Week
title_cn: 特朗普和习近平对下周北京峰会的期望较低
summary: There are many points of contention, but substantive deals are unlikely

title: Honduras’ New President Reviews China Ties
title_cn: 洪都拉斯新总统回顾中国关系
summary: Newly inaugurated Honduran President Nasry Asfura is reviewing agreements made with China by his predecessor, Xiomara Castro, before deciding on restoring relations with Taiwan. Asfura spoke to Bloomberg's Erik Schatzker on May 6 on the sidelines of the Milken Institute Global Conference in Beverly Hills. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: El agresivo despliegue militar de Trump en Panamá mantiene a América Latina en vilo
title_cn: 特朗普在巴拿马的侵略性军事部署让拉丁美洲陷入悬念
summary: Trump busca el “dominio estadounidense” en la región con el mayor despliegue de tropas de EE.UU. de la historia.

title: US Awaits Iran's Peace Deal Response | Balance of Power: Early Edition 5/07/2026
title_cn: 美国等待伊朗和平协议回应|权力平衡：早期版本 5/07/2026
summary: Bloomberg Washington Correspondents Joe Mathieu and Kailey Leinz deliver insight and analysis on the latest headlines from the White House and Capitol Hill, including conversations with influential lawmakers and key figures in politics and policy. The US is waiting on Iran to respond to its proposal to reopen the Strait of Hormuz and end a war that’s killed thousands of people, with tensions still high in both the Persian Gulf and in Lebanon. Iran’s leaders are yet to indicate whether they’ll accept the terms of the deal, though they’ve previously shown little sign of yielding on their nuclear program and accepting a moratorium on enriching uranium, both top US demands. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Fed Can't Lose Credibility, Says Doubleline's Campbell
title_cn: Doubleline 的坎贝尔表示，美联储不能失去信誉
summary: Bill Campbell, Doubleline Global, Sovereign and Emerging Markets Head, talks about how the war with Iran is impacting markets, a lasting inflation shock and making sure markets don't lose confidence in the Federal Reserve. He speaks on a special "Bloomberg The Close" from Los Angeles. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Farkas: Iran's Nuclear Program is "Number One Problem"
title_cn: 法卡斯：伊朗核计划是“头号问题”
summary:
The US is waiting on Iran to respond to its proposal to reopen the Strait of Hormuz and end a war that’s killed thousands of people, with tensions still high in both the Persian Gulf and in Lebanon. Iran’s leaders are yet to indicate whether they’ll accept the terms of the deal, though they’ve previously shown little sign of yielding on their nuclear program and accepting a moratorium on enriching uranium, both top US demands.

Evelyn Farkas is Executive Director of the McCain Institute and Former Deputy Assistant Secretary of Defense for Russia, Ukraine, and Eurasia. She speaks with Bloomberg's Kailey Leinz on Balance of Power. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Iran Warn Stalls Trump's Affordability Agenda
title_cn: 伊朗警告阻碍特朗普的负担能力议程
summary:
The Trump administration’s fitful campaign to address US voters’ affordability concerns ahead of the midterm elections is faltering, with some key efforts stalled, cast aside or limited in scope. 

The war in Iran has driven up gas prices and sent a chill through the spring housing market. It has also drowned out the administration’s set-piece events meant to highlight larger tax refunds and measures to lower drug prices.

Liz Pancotti, Managing Director of Policy and Advocacy at the Groundwork Collaborative, discusses how consumers are experiencing a spending slowdown. She speaks with Bloomberg's Kailey Leinz on Balance of Power. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Pentagon Watchdog Declines to Probe Kid Rock Flights
title_cn: 五角大楼监管机构拒绝调查 Kid Rock 航班
summary: The Defense Department’s independent watchdog is declining to investigate a US Army helicopter flight near the home of musician Kid Rock and at a “No Kings” protest against President Donald Trump, according to a letter from the Pentagon’s new inspector general.

title: Chilean President Kast’s Mega Economic Bill Clears First Hurdle as Trouble Brews
title_cn: 智利总统卡斯特的大型经济法案扫清了困境中的第一个障碍
summary: Chilean President José Antonio Kast’s flagship economic bill cleared its first congressional hurdle on Thursday, but the vote gives the new administration little respite as it works to muster legislative support.

title: Honduras Reviews China Deals, Mulls Restoring Taiwan Ties
title_cn: 洪都拉斯审视中国交易，考虑恢复与台湾的关系
summary: Honduras’ new president is reviewing his predecessor’s agreements with China, a process that could help the US push to reduce the Asian nation’s influence in the region and lead to recognition of Taiwan.

title: Rubio Approves $25.8 Billion in Weapons Push for Mideast Nations
title_cn: 卢比奥批准向中东国家提供 258 亿美元的武器
summary: Secretary of State Marco Rubio approved the sale of hundreds of prized air-defense interceptors and other weapons to Middle East partners in deals worth $25.8 billion, three times the amount disclosed when the administration announced the agreements last week.

title: Prediction Market Ban for US House Members, Staff Gets GOP Push
title_cn: 共和党推动美国众议院议员和工作人员禁止预测市场
summary: Rep. Ashley Hinson (R-Iowa) introduced a resolution Thursday that would amend the House rules to ban members and their staff from trading on prediction markets.

title: US Awaits Iranian Response on Deal as Israel Strikes Lebanon
title_cn: 以色列袭击黎巴嫩，美国等待伊朗对协议作出回应
summary: The US is waiting on Iran to respond to its proposal to reopen the Strait of Hormuz and end a war that’s killed thousands of people, with tensions still high in both the Persian Gulf and in Lebanon.

title: Ghana Asks AU to Probe Xenophobic Attacks in South Africa
title_cn: 加纳要求非盟调查南非的仇外袭击事件
summary: Ghana escalated a complaint over attacks on its citizens in South Africa, urging the African Union to weigh in after a spate of anti-foreigner protests fanned fears of xenophobic violence.

title: Leonardo Vote Narrowly Backs New Meloni Board After CEO Row
title_cn: 莱昂纳多在 CEO 争吵后以微弱优势投票支持新 Meloni 董事会
summary: Leonardo SpA shareholders narrowly approved the Italian government’s slate of board nominees, who overcame a protest vote over Rome’s decision to oust the defense company’s chief executive officer.

title: US Sanctions Iraqi Oil Official, Militia Leaders Linked to Iran
title_cn: 美国制裁与伊朗有关的伊拉克石油官员和民兵领导人
summary: The US sanctioned Iraq’s deputy oil minister and three militia leaders for exploiting the country’s oil sector and supporting Iranian-backed terrorist activity, ramping up pressure on Tehran and its regional proxies as the Trump administration seeks a deal to end a war in its 10th week.

title: French Far-Right’s Bardella Linked to EU Funds Probe, Report Says
title_cn: 报告称法国极右翼分子巴尔德拉与欧盟资金调查有关
summary: European Union prosecutors are investigating possible misappropriation of EU funds relating to media training for French far-right National Rally leader Jordan Bardella and other party members, Agence France-Presse reports, citing a person close to the case.

title: Mexico Plans $8 Billion in Gas Pipelines to Boost Power Sector
title_cn: 墨西哥计划投资 80 亿美元建设天然气管道以促进电力行业发展
summary: Mexico is planning to invest 140 billion pesos ($8.1 billion) in new gas pipelines over the next four years, the latest step in President Claudia Sheinbaum’s plan to boost the country’s power generation.
